notes: Renewal of existing 200MW 10-year PPA at $42.50/MWh fixed escalating 2% annually. NextDecade expanding LNG operations requires firm power. Negotiating force majeure and curtailment provisions. Finance team lead Sandra Okafor.

Expanding FFR (Fast Frequency Response) registration from 50MW to 150MW. Requires controls upgrade to GE Mark VIe and governor tuning. GE scope $2.1M. Net ancillary revenue uplift estimated $4.2M/year.
1-year demand response agreement for 80MW curtailment capacity during ERCOT emergencies. Plant commits to 15-minute response ramp from minimum load. Requires PUCT notification.
